message:
Command `WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== What netlist does step 26 (floorplan) read? ==="
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$WRAPPER_RUN/26-openroad-floorplan/state_in.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('nl:', d.get('nl'))
print('odb:', d.get('odb'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== What netlist does step 38 (ioplacement) read? ==="
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$WRAPPER_RUN/38-openroad-ioplacement/state_in.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('nl:', d.get('nl'))
print('odb:', d.get('odb'))
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Step 38 state_in not accessible"

echo ""
echo "=== Floorplan log: any amuxbus references ==="
grep -i "amuxbus\|unplaced\|not placed" "$WRAPPER_RUN/26-openroad-floorplan/openroad-floorplan.log" 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "No log"

echo ""
echo "=== IO placement: what pins are unplaced? ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/38-openroad-ioplacement/"*.log 2>/dev/null | grep -i "amuxbus\|unplace\|not placed" | head -10 || echo "No IO log"` executed with exit code 0.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== What netlist does step 26 (floorplan) read? ==="
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$WRAPPER_RUN/26-openroad-floorplan/state_in.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('nl:', d.get('nl'))
print('odb:', d.get('odb'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== What netlist does step 38 (ioplacement) read? ==="
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$WRAPPER_RUN/38-openroad-ioplacement/state_in.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('nl:', d.get('nl'))
print('odb:', d.get('odb'))

echo ""
echo "=== Floorplan log: any amuxbus references ==="

echo "=== IO placement: what pins are unplaced? ==="
